data.name: VG0001_Title
data.value: Missing TryParse method

data.name: VG0001_MessageFormat
data.value: Type '{0}' is marked with [AutoParsable] but does not define a 'static bool TryParse(ReadOnlySpan<char>, IFormatProvider?, out {0})' method

data.name: VG0001_Description
data.value: The [AutoParsable] attribute requires a user-defined 'static bool TryParse(ReadOnlySpan<char>, IFormatProvider?, out T)' core method to generate the remaining IParsable<T> and ISpanParsable<T> overloads.

data.name: VG0002_Title
data.value: Type must be partial

data.name: VG0002_MessageFormat
data.value: Type '{0}' must be declared as partial to use the [{1}] attribute

data.name: VG0002_Description
data.value: ValuGen source generators require the type to be partial so the generated code can be added as another partial declaration.

data.name: VG0003_Title
data.value: Type cannot be static

data.name: VG0003_MessageFormat
data.value: Static type '{0}' cannot use the [{1}] attribute; remove the 'static' modifier

data.name: VG0003_Description
data.value: ValuGen source generators cannot generate instance members for static types.

data.name: VG0004_Title
data.value: Type cannot be abstract

data.name: VG0004_MessageFormat
data.value: Abstract type '{0}' cannot use the [{1}] attribute; remove the 'abstract' modifier

data.name: VG0004_Description
data.value: ValuGen source generators cannot generate interface implementations for abstract types.

data.name: VG0005_Title
data.value: Missing Compare method

data.name: VG0005_MessageFormat
data.value: Type '{0}' is marked with [AutoComparable] but does not define a 'static int Compare({0}, {0})' method

data.name: VG0005_Description
data.value: The [AutoComparable] attribute requires a user-defined 'static int Compare(T, T)' core method to generate the remaining IComparable<T>, IComparable, and comparison operator overloads.

data.name: VG0006_Title
data.value: Missing Equal/GetHashCode methods

data.name: VG0006_MessageFormat
data.value: Type '{0}' is marked with [AutoEquality] but does not define both 'static bool Equal({0}, {0})' and 'override int GetHashCode()' methods

data.name: VG0006_Description
data.value: The [AutoEquality] attribute requires both 'static bool Equal(T, T)' and 'override int GetHashCode()' methods to generate IEquatable<T> and equality operator overloads.

data.name: VG0007_Title
data.value: Missing TryFormat method

data.name: VG0007_MessageFormat
data.value: Type '{0}' is marked with [AutoFormattable] but does not define a 'bool TryFormat(Span<char>, out int, ReadOnlySpan<char>, IFormatProvider?)' method

data.name: VG0007_Description
data.value: The [AutoFormattable] attribute requires a user-defined 'bool TryFormat(Span<char>, out int, ReadOnlySpan<char>, IFormatProvider?)' core method to generate the remaining IFormattable and ISpanFormattable overloads.

data.name: VG0008_Title
data.value: Missing ToString or MaxBufferSize

data.name: VG0008_MessageFormat
data.value: Type '{0}' is marked with [AutoFormattable] but does not define 'string ToString(string?, IFormatProvider?)' and has no 'const int MaxBufferSize' field

data.name: VG0008_Description
data.value: The [AutoFormattable] attribute requires either a user-defined 'string ToString(string?, IFormatProvider?)' method or a 'const int MaxBufferSize' field to generate the ToString overload using stackalloc or ArrayPool.

data.name: ExceptionMessage_InvalidFormat
data.value: Input string was not in a correct format for type '{0}'.
